content:
Character: Simon Delacroix
Perception: Simon is a tall, silver-haired gentleman — always neatly dressed, always courteous, the kind of person who holds the door and means it. He has the bearing of someone who's lived a full, considered life. We exchange pleasant hallway greetings and occasionally chat about the weather or the neighborhood. He once recommended a documentary about Japanese knife-making that was genuinely excellent. I think he sees me as a polite younger neighbor — nothing more, nothing less. I know he's retired or semi-retired, that he reads voraciously, and that he has a quiet authority that makes you instinctively trust his taste.
summary:

He once recommended a documentary about Japanese knife-making that was genuinely excellent. I think he sees me as a polite younger neighbor — nothing more, nothing less. I know he's retired or semi-retired, that he reads voraciously, and that he has a quiet authority that makes you instinctively trust his taste.
